response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (including MCP) at re:cinq — directly matching the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Strong polyglot background (Java, TypeScript, DLang, C/C++), demonstrated architecture skills, and a craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) make them a strong fit. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited recent cloud/Kubernetes specifics, but these are learnable given the seniority.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience directly matches a key requirement
Deep polyglot full-stack background (TS/Node, React, Java, Python-adjacent) with 13+ years
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, testing frameworks, public talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Vitest not listed; testing background leans Jest/Selenium/custom D tooling
Limited recent cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz
